global.description: An ad for the brand that features a solid background covering the full canvas, creating a cohesive and unified visual experience. The background is predominantly light green, which serves as a canvas for the various elements of the ad. At the top of the ad, prominently displayed, is the 'NeonArena' logo. This logo consists of bold black text on a light green rectangular background, ensuring it stands out and is easily recognizable. The logo is positioned centrally at the top, establishing the brand identity immediately. Below the logo, the ad features a series of decorative elements that contribute to a dynamic and engaging visual composition. These include a grid of light green rounded squares and rectangles, each with a darker green dot in the top left corner, adding a playful and modern touch to the design. These shapes are arranged in the upper section of the ad, creating a sense of movement and rhythm. Additionally, a light green diagonal shape with a gradient effect is located in the top left corner, blending into the background and enhancing the visual depth. A white triangle pointing to the right is positioned towards the upper right section, adjacent to the geometric shapes, adding contrast and directing attention towards the center. In the center of the ad, the main headline reads 'Beat your rivals' in bold black text, with a subheadline 'Free rewards for new players' in smaller black text below. This text is set against the green background, ensuring readability and emphasis on the core message. At the bottom, we see a black rounded rectangle CTA button with white text that reads 'Start now'. This button is centrally located near the bottom, inviting immediate action from the viewer.
global.main_message: Beat your rivals with free rewards for new players
